title: agelanthus flammeus
intro: Agelanthus flammeus, also known as the "fire bush", is a plant species in the family Loranthaceae, known for its bright red berries and yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in African folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Agelanthus flammeus include relief from pain and swelling, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
